title: Battle With Hyrule - Final Fantasy 6 (YTP)
description:
The is the prequel to  "Battle with The King". Here, the heroes need to battle all of the Hyrule royal family before they take on His Majsty himself

Special thanks to carrythesememories - http://www.youtube.com/user/carrythesememoriess for making the sprites and making me do this lol.

Now, the reason the sprites here are shooped over the in-game footage and not exacly in game is because there is no way to put sprites during that fight scene. The original monsters are part of the background, which cannot be changed with any editors. And you can't put custom monsters there either because the sprites will not show.

MP3 Download link:
http://www.mediafire.com/?xmmyemv25zl
